title: CCAvenue Global Group is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: CCAvenue Global Group is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
CCAvenue Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Jodhpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About CCAvenue Global Group:
CCAvenue Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CCAvenue Global Group!
